title: Experiment: parallel JSON parsing for load_from_dir

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Experiment: parallel JSON parsing in load_from_dir (Rayon) with sequential insert. Bench: /tmp/bench_repeat.py (10k full_database_cold_load). Baseline Rust mean 478.758 ms (median 449.211). New Rust runs [385.523, 384.113, 390.311, 390.056, 390.726], mean 388.146 ms, median 390.056 (~19% faster). Python unchanged (mean 536.593, median 501.1 on same run). Decision: keep change; adds rayon dependency but meaningful speedup.
